---
title: "NEMD 2020, London"
---

```{=html}
<p class="event-meta">1st meeting &middot; 17 January 2020 &middot; Brunel University London</p>
```

The meeting that started the series. Organised by Edward Smith (Brunel University London) and James Ewen (Imperial College London) as the kick-off of the Non-Equilibrium Molecular Dynamics special interest group of the [UK Fluids Network](https://fluids.ac.uk/sig/NonEqmMD).

Records of this first meeting are sparse. If you have photos or a programme from the day, please email [contact.nemd@gmail.com](mailto:contact.nemd@gmail.com); we would like to complete the archive.
